message:
fix(ci): resolve Windows clippy lints for cross-platform cfg blocks

- tools.rs: Gate `use Duration` with `#[cfg(unix)]` (only used in unix test)
- tools.rs, extension_dispatcher.rs, extensions.rs: Allow unnecessary_lazy_evaluations
  on exit_status_code() - the closure IS needed on unix for signal() but on Windows
  the cfg strips it to a constant
- config.rs: Move settings_path binding inside #[cfg(unix)] block where it's used

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
